<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Place error last in result lists. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func Load() (error, string)
```

## Good

```go
func Load() (string, error)
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only error-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
